title: Attendance page loads and shows records after login
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access the attendance page and see attendance records displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view attendance
Verify attendance records are displayed

title: Filter attendance records by date
description: Verifies the attendance list can be filtered using a valid date selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view attendance
Filter attendance by selecting a valid date
Verify filtered attendance records are displayed

title: Search for a specific student in attendance
description: Verifies searching in the attendance view narrows results to the matching student.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view attendance
Fill a student identifier into the attendance search field
Verify attendance records match the search criteria

title: Filter by date then search within filtered results
description: Verifies combining date filtering and student search yields results consistent with both constraints.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view attendance
Filter attendance by selecting a valid date
Fill a student identifier into the attendance search field
Verify attendance records reflect both the selected date and the search criteria

title: Clear search restores unfiltered attendance list
description: Verifies clearing the search input returns the attendance view to the broader list state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view attendance
Fill a student identifier into the attendance search field
Clear the attendance search field
Verify the attendance list is no longer restricted by the prior search

title: Search with no matches shows an empty state
description: Verifies entering a query that matches no students shows an empty results state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view attendance
Fill a nonsensical unique query into the attendance search field
Verify an empty state message is visible for no matching attendance records

title: Attempt to access attendance while unauthenticated redirects to login
description: Verifies protected attendance route requires authentication and sends the user to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /attendance
Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: View classes list after login
description: Verifies an authenticated instructor/admin can load the classes page and see a list of classes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the classes page
Verify a list of classes is displayed

title: Open class details to view roster and recent attendance
description: Verifies a user can open a class from the list and see the roster and recent attendance activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the classes page
Click on a class in the list to open its details
Verify the class roster is displayed
Verify recent attendance activity for the class is displayed

title: Search for a non-existent class shows no results
description: Verifies searching for a class that does not exist results in a no-results/empty-state message.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the classes page
Fill in the class search field with ClassThatShouldNotExist_987654
Press Enter
Verify a no results or empty state message is visible for the classes list

title: Attempt to open a class that is not in the current list
description: Verifies selecting a class that is not present (after filtering) does not show class details and presents an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the classes page
Fill in the class search field with ClassThatShouldNotExist_123456
Press Enter
Wait for the filtered results to update
Verify no class details are displayed
Verify a no results or empty state message is visible

title: Classes page remains usable after clearing a search filter
description: Verifies clearing a search restores the classes list after a no-results search.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the classes page
Fill in the class search field with ClassThatShouldNotExist_555555
Press Enter
Clear the class search field
Press Enter
Verify a list of classes is displayed

title: Navigate away and back to Classes preserves ability to open class details
description: Verifies the user can return to the classes page via in-app navigation and still open class details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the classes page
Click the navigation link to the dashboard page
Click the navigation link to the classes page
Click on a class in the list to open its details
Verify the class roster is displayed
